framework.name: Volume Discount Negotiation as Pricing Mechanism
framework.description: Co-packer pricing is relationship-based and volume-dependent rather than transparent or algorithmic. As volumes increase, brands must 'renegotiate' and 'request volume discounts', implying pricing is opaque and manually managed rather than systematically optimized.
framework.raw_quote: as your food product takes off and your volume of orders increases it is possible to renegotiate your deal with the co-packer and request a volume discount which will lower the price per unit cost
